creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 158177
Proposed update to 2.2.7.

Update to 2.2.7.

Add patch to build with clang.
Add LICENSE_FILE
No need to overwrite PKGCONFIGDIR
Make manpage regenration optional, don't try to build manpage even if depends are available.
Instead of patching the location of OpenCL/vendors use sed, since we need to patch two files.
